evals.prompt: I tried BootstrapFewShot on my classifier but the results are inconsistent — some runs work great and others are bad. I have about 100 labeled examples. How do I get more reliable optimization?
evals.expected_output: Uses BootstrapFewShotWithRandomSearch to search over multiple candidate demo sets

assertions.name: metric_signature
assertions.description: Defines a metric function with the (example, prediction, trace=None) signature

assertions.name: calls_compile
assertions.description: Calls optimizer.compile(program, trainset=trainset) to run the optimization

assertions.name: shows_evaluation
assertions.description: Shows how to evaluate the optimized program on a separate devset

evals.prompt: I have a two-step DSPy pipeline (extract facts then answer). I want to optimize the demos for both steps at once using random search. I have 80 training examples.
evals.expected_output: Optimizes a multi-step pipeline with BootstrapFewShotWithRandomSearch

assertions.name: optimizes_full_pipeline
assertions.description: Uses BootstrapFewShotWithRandomSearch on the full pipeline module (not individual predictors)

assertions.name: small_demo_counts
assertions.description: Sets max_bootstrapped_demos and max_labeled_demos to small values (2-4) since multi-step pipelines accumulate demos across steps

assertions.name: explains_simultaneous
assertions.description: Explains that the optimizer finds demos for all predictors simultaneously

assertions.name: end_to_end_metric
assertions.description: Shows the end-to-end metric evaluates the final pipeline output, not individual steps

evals.prompt: I want to use a large model (GPT-4o) to generate high-quality demos but deploy with a smaller model (GPT-4o-mini). How do I set this up with BootstrapFewShotWithRandomSearch?
evals.expected_output: Uses teacher_settings to bootstrap with a larger model

assertions.name: configures_student
assertions.description: Configures dspy.configure(lm=student_lm) for the student model

assertions.name: uses_teacher_settings
assertions.description: Passes teacher_settings={'lm': teacher_lm} to the optimizer constructor

assertions.name: explains_teacher_student
assertions.description: The optimized program runs on the student model but uses demos generated by the teacher

assertions.name: provider_agnostic
assertions.description: Does not hardcode a single provider — uses provider-agnostic LM strings
